title: MLPerf workload manifest (shell contract)
description: Schema for the WL_* variables defined in each workloads/<name>.manifest.sh. Used by tests/test_manifest_schema.bats to prevent silent drift and by tools/gen_manifest.sh as a field reference.

WL_NAME.description: Identifier; must match the manifest filename (minus .manifest.sh).

WL_DISPLAY.description: Human-readable name shown in the picker.

WL_IMPL_SUBDIR.description: Path relative to the mlcommons training_results clone, e.g. NVIDIA/benchmarks/<name>/implementations/<impl>.

WL_HUB_REPO.description: Docker Hub org/repo (empty = build locally only).

WL_IMAGE_TAG_BASE.description: Local image tag base, e.g. llama31_8b-pyt.

WL_IMAGE_TAG_VARIANTS.description: Suffixes appended to WL_IMAGE_TAG_BASE when pulling published variants (e.g. blackwell, sm89).

WL_DATASET_SUBDIR.description: Sub-directory under $DATADIR that holds this workload's dataset root.

WL_DATASET_SIZE_GB.description: Approximate total disk size of the staged dataset.

WL_DATASET_MARKER_FILES.description: Files whose presence means the dataset is staged.

WL_DATASET_MARKER_DIRS.description: Directories whose presence means the dataset is staged.

WL_DOWNLOAD_SCRIPT.description: Path (inside WL_IMPL_SUBDIR) to the downloader script, or empty to surface manual steps.

WL_DOWNLOAD_ENV.description: KEY=VALUE passed as -e when running the downloader in-container.

WL_DOWNLOAD_HOST_ENV.description: KEY=VALUE exported when running the downloader bare-metal. $DATADIR expands.

WL_PREPROC_HOST_SUBPATH.description: Sub-dir under $DATADIR bound into /preproc_data (or custom mount) at run time.

WL_PREPROC_MOUNT.description: In-container path for the preproc dataset mount.

WL_TOKENIZER_HOST_SUBPATH.description: Optional — sub-dir containing the tokenizer or auxiliary mount.

WL_PRETRAIN_PY.description: Optional — required only if bare_multi (torchrun multi-node) is supported.

WL_CONTAINER_WORKDIR.description: Container WORKDIR where configs and entry script reside.

WL_SMOKE_SUPPORTED.description: Whether the workload can run a synthetic/mock single-GPU smoke test.

WL_SMOKE_ENV.description: KEY=VALUE pairs exported for smoke runs.

WL_SMOKE_PROMPTS.description: KEY:default pairs prompted from the user in smoke mode.

WL_DOCKERFILE_PATCH_FROM.description: Optional — literal string to find in the workload Dockerfile for sm_89 / custom patches.
